summary: Tested the extended marker color system for Bloom Czech platform. New 'Zprávy' (messages) and 'Můj profil' (profile) color fields added to admin panel 'Barvy nadpisových markerů' card. All 10 feature requirements verified: 8/8 backend tests passed, 9/9 frontend UI checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 9 color keys properly defined in: MarkerColorsCard.js (COLOR_FIELDS), AppSettingsContext.js (DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS), useAdminData.js (fetchMarkerColors defaults), and backend settings.py (DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS)
Frontend merge pattern `{ ...DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS, ...colorsRes.data }` ensures messages/profile always have defaults even if DB was pre-extension
MessagesPage.js L209: `markerColors?.messages || '#8A7CFF'` - correctly uses context color with fallback
ProfilePage.js L53: `markerColors?.profile || '#F5A9B8'` - correctly uses context color with fallback
seed_data_creation: Saved marker colors with #ff6b6b for messages temporarily during testing; restored to #8A7CFF before test completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marker color system now has 9 fields (7 original + messages + profile). Admin panel shows all 9 in Obsah tab > Barvy nadpisových markerů. Messages page /messages shows purple dot (#8A7CFF), Profile page /profile shows pink dot (#F5A9B8). Save/persist flow confirmed working. Login: type email, type password, press Enter. To reach Obsah tab: use 'button:has-text("Obsah")' selector after navigating to /admin.

detailed_results.T2_api_get_dict: PASS - Response is a JSON dict of hex colors
detailed_results.T3_api_get_keys: PASS - All color values are valid hex strings starting with '#'
detailed_results.T5_api_put_admin_saves: PASS - Admin can PUT marker colors (messages + profile included)
detailed_results.T6_api_put_messages_persisted: PASS - messages color persisted correctly via API
detailed_results.T7_api_put_profile_persisted: PASS - profile color persisted correctly via API
detailed_results.T10_admin_profile_field: PASS - 'Můj profil' field present with data-testid='marker-color-profile'
detailed_results.T11_admin_edit_messages_picker: PASS - color-picker-messages visible in edit mode, value=#8A7CFF
detailed_results.T12_admin_edit_profile_picker: PASS - color-picker-profile visible in edit mode, value=#F5A9B8
detailed_results.T13_admin_9_pickers: PASS - 9 color pickers present in edit mode
detailed_results.T14_admin_save_messages_color: PASS - Changed messages to #ff6b6b, saved, API returned messages=#ff6b6b
detailed_results.T15_admin_toast: PASS - Toast 'Barvy markerů uloženy' shown after save
detailed_results.T16_messages_page_section_marker: PASS - section-marker in h1 on /messages page, bg=rgb(138,124,255)=#8A7CFF
detailed_results.T17_profile_page_section_marker: PASS - section-marker in h1 on /profile page, bg=rgb(245,169,184)=#F5A9B8
